meaning: pron.<拉> 同上,同前,同一作者
examples: The forth part introduces the res judicata and principle of non bis idem.
For envy is a gadding passion, and walketh the streets, and doth not keep home: Non est curiosus, quin idem sit malevolus.
Idem is a fashion consulting company formed by a young team of passional designers in continuous development to always offer an innovative trend of design.
Now her children sleep through the night, but Idem Finkley still stays up on her own, to trade foreign exchange.
It was just the sort of episode that has encouraged Idem Finkley several nights a week to settle down her kids around 8 p.m.
